author: Flynn
note: This is the very first prototype of the Yggdrasil cosmology – only 7 planes existed at this stage. The 9-plane final model with Divine Core and Void as separate layers was added later in 2024.
description: Pre-unification prototype – for historical and prior-art purposes only

state_vector.note: This became the final s(x) = [C, S, P, H] vector

historical_significance: First written proof that the Kripke-ladder adjacency rule and bounded structural drift were conceived in early 2024. All later 9-plane versions are direct descendants.
